subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy sweet-scented letter hath been received, wherein thou didst herald tidings concerning a gathering [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شیرین مضامین وصول یافت مژده داده بودید که از انجمنی
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @nearness and remoteness, @consultation, @wisdom [hikmat], @being a source of light; guidance
